expectations.text: Output shows all 3 stages: advocate defense, critic challenge, and arbiter ruling
expectations.evidence: All 3 stages present: Stage 1 Eval-Advocate, Stage 2 Eval-Critic, Stage 3 Eval-Arbiter

expectations.text: Advocate honestly flags gaps with ACKNOWLEDGE_GAP, not inflating
expectations.evidence: Advocate marks all 4 criteria as ACKNOWLEDGE_GAP, gives low dimension scores (1-2), and lists detailed Honest Gaps

expectations.text: Critic identifies the 5K row crash as a deal-breaker
expectations.evidence: C-002: Application crashes on valid input (severity: critical). DB-002 confirmed as deal-breaker

expectations.text: Critic identifies missing merchant and status fields
expectations.evidence: C-003: Missing fields break data contract (severity: critical). Only 3/5 fields implemented

expectations.text: Critic flags the 'Coming soon' placeholder as an integrity violation
expectations.evidence: C-006: Placeholder UI shipped as 'implementation' (severity: high). 'Coming soon' div is not implementation
C-005: Zero test coverage (severity: high). No tests exist for any functionality

expectations.text: Functionality score is below the threshold of 7
